operational_knowledge_units.title: AgvErrorModel table stores AGV error definitions and metric classification
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the AgvErrorModel table stores the list of errors, their codes, and descriptions, and that errors are classified as critical or noncritical for metrics purposes.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Robotics Database / AGV Error Model'
Visible text: 'The AgvErrorModel tables stores the list of errors and their codes as well as provides a description of the error.'
Visible text: 'For metrics purposes errors are classified as critical and noncritical.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robotics Database AGV Error Model. AgvErrorModel table stores AGV errors, error codes, and error descriptions. Errors are classified as critical and noncritical for metrics purposes.
